origin: FSWEPP Rock:Clime PRISM-assisted custom CLIGEN climate
claim: Independent, corrected descendant that localizes a selected CLIGEN station to registered monthly PRISM normals and then runs unchanged faithful CLIGEN.

pedigree.contribution: Originated the PRISM-assisted custom-CLIGEN climate concept and expanded station lineage.
Automated station selection and monthly .par localization; reviewed as prior art rather than port authority.
Independently specified hash-pinned local implementation with corrected selector, numeric, rendering, acquisition, and provenance behavior.

limitations.statement: PRISM supplies monthly precipitation, Tmax, and Tmin normals, not observed daily sequences, occurrence probabilities, or subdaily intensity.
The selected station supplies variance, skew, persistence, storm shape, radiation, dew point, and wind structure not replaced by the mode.
Wet-day and MX .5 P adjustments are bounded continuity heuristics, not PRISM-derived occurrence or intensity observations.
The mode uses one containing 4 km cell with no interpolation, lapse-rate adjustment, elevation input, or terrain downscaling.
Station selection is a registered cligen-rs heuristic and is not identical to FSWEPP user selection or the current WEPPcloud US heuristic.
Fixed 1991-2020 normals do not represent event-specific gradients, trends, climate change, or year-to-year spatial anomalies.
Independent point runs do not establish coherent storms or shared daily states across a watershed.
Operational history and comparator performance do not certify general climate accuracy or fitness for a particular WEPP application.
Localized CLIGEN outputs are derived artifacts and are not official PRISM products.
